UML Use Case Diagram — COEP College Management System Full use case diagram with actors Student, Teacher, Admin, ExamCellStaff and correct include/extend/association relationships derived from source code.
UML use case diagram — COEP college management system
«system» COEP college management system

«include»
Send notification (publish results triggers notify) -->
View quizzes (internal check — view available quizzes is a step inside attempt) -->
Login (optional, triggered when session ends after pw change) -->
«extend»
Login (must be logged in — extend: check auth) -->
Fill exam form (optional: student may view result after form approved) -->
Publish results
Publish results (student can view ONLY when result published) -->
«extend»
Send notification -->
«include»
Approve exam form (marks upload only after form approved — extend) -->
«extend»
Student use cases Teacher use cases Admin use cases Exam cell use cases
Legend
Association (actor ↔ use case)
«include» (mandatory behaviour)
«extend» (optional / conditional)
